c.d: The total quantity of predefined collage templates available in the app to facilitate quick and diverse collage creation.
Range and sophistication of photo editing tools including filters, text addition, cropping, background removal, stickers, and AI-powered enhancements.
Platforms on which the app is available such as iOS, Android, Web, Windows.
Cost to use the app including free usage, subscription plans, and in-app purchases.
How intuitive and user-friendly the app interface is, affecting the ease of creating collages.
Availability of AI tools such as background removal, automatic template generation, and image enhancement.
